Marylon Marie Boyd, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff Mitchell Boyd, Plaintiff Keith Hongo, Plaintiff Charles Boyd, and Plaintiff Lois Boyd via Zoom Video Conference.
Plaintiff Lois Boyd appeared via Zoom Video Conference, was placed under oath and testified.
Plaintiff Mitchell Boyd appeared via Zoom Video Conference, was placed under oath and testified.
Plaintiff Keith Hongo not appearing.
Plaintiff Charles Boyd not appearing.
Defendant Kelly Doran not appearing.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Quiet Title filed October 9, 2018.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant filed February 6, 2019
Default entered as to Defendant Kelly Doran on March 22, 2019.
Motion to set aside Default filed April 19, 2019.
Order Denying Motion to set aside Default filed August 12, 2019.
Defendant Zita LLC Dismissed on February 2, 2019.
Defendants Carla Clay and Joe Clay Trust Dismissed April 13, 2022.
Defendant Does 1-10 Dismissed April 21, 2023.

The Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:

Exhibit 7: Civil Harassment Restraining Order after Hearing.
Exhibit 8: Copy of the Court Filed Complaint for Damages.
Exhibit 9: Statement of Damages
Exhibit 10: Proof of Personal service as to Defendant Kelly Doran
Exhibit 11: Copy of San Francisco Department of Emergency Management Ledger
Exhibit 13: Photos
Exhibit 14: Copy of the San Francisco Residential Rent Stabilization and Arbitration Board Repor of Alleged Wrongful Eviction.
Exhibit 15: Correspondence.
Exhibit 16: Copy of the Court Filed Order Denying Motion to set aside Default and Default Judgment.
Exhibit 17: Copy of the Court Filed Order Denying Renewed Motion and Motion to reconsider prior Order Denying Motion to Vacate Default Judgment.
Exhibit 18: Copy of the Court Filed Request for Entry of Default

The matter is submitted.

The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defendant as follows.

Damages: $200, 000.00
Attorney's Fees: $20,425.00
Costs: $505.85

Proposed Judgment signed and filed this date.
